info.description: HTTP API for TaxKit health checks, public calculator metadata and public calculator execution.
info.title: TaxKit API

get.description: Return one public calculator catalog entry.

post.description: Run one public calculator using canonical scenario decoding and rule-pack layers.

get.description: Return graph edges and canonical graph validation diagnostics for one calculator.
